Thus the user wants exactly three lines: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=repair blind structural gate failures, blocked_move=do not invent source IDs.

Thus the answer is:

repair_target=repair blind structural gate failures
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

No trailing spaces. Must be exactly three lines.

Thus answer.
</think>

blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
